name: slopblock
description: GitHub App for diff-grounded PR comprehension quizzes

scripts.prisma:migrate: pnpm exec dotenv -e .env.local -- prisma migrate dev
scripts.prisma:deploy: pnpm exec dotenv -e .env.local -- prisma migrate deploy
scripts.test: node --import tsx --test tests/config.test.ts tests/heuristics.test.ts tests/quiz.test.ts tests/app-render.test.ts tests/util.test.ts tests/crypto.test.ts tests/markdown.test.ts tests/auth.test.ts && node --experimental-test-module-mocks --import tsx --test tests/webhook-integration.test.ts tests/marketplace-store.test.ts tests/marketplace-webhook.test.ts tests/subscriptions-cron.test.ts
scripts.check:quality: pnpm run lint && pnpm run fmt:check
